description_long: This is a modern, single-story house situated on a triangular lot bordered by two intersecting roads. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of white and gray exterior walls, with some sections accented by wood or stone paneling. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered garage, a landscaped yard with scattered trees and shrubs, and a patio area with outdoor seating. Large windows are asymmetrically placed, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The main entrance is set back from the street, partially sheltered by an overhang and framed by minimalist landscaping. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped triangular lot bordered by roads. Features include a garage, patio, and minimalist entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and a landscaped yard with trees and a patio area.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the patio, outdoor seating, and the triangular shape of the lot with more visible greenery.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the expanse of the yard with scattered trees.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear facade, more private yard space, and the boundary wall along the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, steps, and a simple door, partially sheltered and integrated with landscaping.
